title: univiscidiatus corniculatus
intro: Univiscidiatus corniculatus, also known as common creeping thistle, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of univiscidiatus corniculatus include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
